title: NEET UG 2026 Subjects and Marks
description: Physics has 45 questions for 180 marks, Chemistry has 45 questions for 180 marks, and Biology has 90 questions for 360 marks.
content: NEET UG 2026 subjects Physics 45 questions 180 marks Chemistry 45 questions 180 marks Biology Botany Zoology 90 questions 360 marks total 180 compulsory questions total 720 marks correct answer +4 incorrect answer -1 unanswered 0 marks

description: General/General-EWS qualifying percentile is 50th, SC/ST/OBC-NCL is 40th, PwBD General is 45th, and PwBD reserved category is 40th.

title: NEET UG 2026 Eligibility
description: NEET eligibility includes 17 years by 31 December 2026, PCB or Biotechnology with English, no upper age limit, and NEET qualification for Indian students planning foreign medical courses.
content: NEET UG 2026 eligibility 17 years age on or before 31 December 2026 born on or before 31 December 2009 no upper age limit Physics Chemistry Biology Biotechnology English recognized qualifying examination result awaited candidates must pass by first counselling round Indian citizens OCI candidates foreign medical dental institution need to qualify NEET UG

title: NEET UG 2026 Application Fee
description: NEET UG 2026 application fee: General Rs. 1,700; General-EWS/OBC-NCL Rs. 1,600; SC/ST/PwBD/PwD/Third Gender Rs. 1,000; outside India Rs. 9,500.
content: NEET UG 2026 application fee General Rs 1700 General EWS OBC NCL Rs 1600 SC ST PwBD PwD Third Gender Rs 1000 candidates applying outside India Rs 9500

title: NEET UG 2026 Question Paper Languages
description: NEET UG question-paper media include English, Hindi, Assamese, Bengali, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Odia, Punjabi, Tamil, Telugu and Urdu.
content: NEET UG 2026 question paper languages English Hindi Assamese Bengali Gujarati Kannada Malayalam Marathi Odia Punjabi Tamil Telugu Urdu English-only papers bilingual Hindi regional language with English English version final if translation ambiguous

title: NEET UG 2026 Result OMR and Answer-Key Process
description: NTA displays OMR sheets and recorded responses, allows answer-key challenges, reviews through subject experts and prepares merit list and All India Rank.
content: NEET UG 2026 result process NTA displays scanned OMR answer sheets recorded responses provisional answer key challenge non refundable processing fee subject experts review final key result preparation merit list All India Rank no rechecking no re-evaluation after result declaration
